findings.evidence: Existing API: `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Hom.lean:134:instance instModule : Module R (Hom R C M N)`; Mathlib replacement: `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Module/NatInt.lean:92:abbrev Module.addCommMonoidToAddCommGroup`; duplicated PR block: `Preadditive.lean:54-129`.
findings.fix: Define the hom additive group via `Module.addCommMonoidToAddCommGroup R` and keep only any non-duplicative simp lemmas needed for the comodule API.
findings.issue: `instNeg`, `instSub`, `instZSMul`, and `instAddCommGroupRing` duplicate the additive group structure already derivable from the existing `Module R (Comodule.Hom R C M N)` instance.

summary: The preadditive instance is new, but the PR hand-builds the additive group structure on comodule morphisms even though TauCeti already makes those homs an `R`-module and Mathlib has the ring-module bridge for exactly this case.
